ddls:
CREATE TABLE "launches" (
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch */,
  "rocket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rocket used in the launch */,
  "launchpad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launchpad where the launch occurred */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date of the launch */,
  "launch_time" TEXT /* Time of the launch */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "mission_description" TEXT /* Description of the mission */,
  "launch_status" TEXT /* Status of the launch (e.g., 'Success', 'Failure', 'Aborted') */,
  "launch_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the launch (e.g., 'Orbit Achieved', 'Re-entry Successful') */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew assigned to the launch (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_launchpad_id FOREIGN KEY ("launchpad_id") REFERENCES launchpads ("launchpad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crews ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_rocket_id FOREIGN KEY ("rocket_id") REFERENCES rockets ("rocket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rockets" (
  "rocket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rocket */,
  "rocket_name" TEXT /* Name of the rocket */,
  "rocket_type" TEXT /* Type of the rocket */,
  "payload_capacity" REAL /* Payload capacity of the rocket in kg */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used in the rocket */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine used in the rocket */,
  "thrust_to_weight_ratio" REAL /* Thrust-to-weight ratio of the rocket */,
  "specific_impulse" REAL /* Specific impulse of the rocket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rocket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launchpads" (
  "launchpad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launchpad */,
  "launchpad_name" TEXT /* Name of the launchpad */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the launchpad */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the launchpad */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the launchpad */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the launchpad (in meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launchpad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spacecraft" (
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_type" TEXT /* Type of the spacecraft */,
  "payload_capacity" REAL /* Payload capacity of the spacecraft in kg */,
  "propulsion_system" TEXT /* Type of propulsion system used in the spacecraft */,
  "communication_system" TEXT /* Type of communication system used in the spacecraft */,
  "power_source" TEXT /* Source of power for the spacecraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spacecraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payloads" (
  "payload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payload */,
  "payload_name" TEXT /* Name of the payload */,
  "payload_type" TEXT /* Type of the payload */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the payload in kg */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the payload (in meters) */,
  "power_requirements" REAL /* Power requirements of the payload (in watts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crews" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew */,
  "mission_specialist" TEXT /* Name of the mission specialist */,
  "pilot" TEXT /* Name of the pilot */,
  "commander" TEXT /* Name of the commander */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_windows" (
  "launch_window_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch window */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch mission */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the launch window */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the launch window */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the launch window (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_window_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orbital_parameters" (
  "orbital_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orbital parameter set */,
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spacecraft */,
  "semi_major_axis" REAL /* Semi-major axis of the orbit (in meters) */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity of the orbit */,
  "inclination" REAL /* Inclination of the orbit (in degrees) */,
  "longitude_of_ascending_node" REAL /* Longitude of the ascending node (in degrees) */,
  "argument_of_periapsis" REAL /* Argument of periapsis (in degrees) */,
  "mean_motion" REAL /* Mean motion of the spacecraft (in revolutions per day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orbital_parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "performance_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch mission */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_reports" (
  "anomaly_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly report */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch mission */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly */,
  "anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly (e.g., 'Critical', 'Major', 'Minor') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_report_id")
)
column_names: ID of the rocket used in the launch
